description: 847 miles of high-risk overhead lines in Very High FHSZ identified. No undergrounding completed. SCE infrastructure cited as Eaton Fire ignition source.
Defensible space compliance at 61% in High FHSZ zones. 40% of vegetation management deferred 2023-2024 due to budget constraints.
Post-Woolsey (2018) and post-Palisades (2025) building code recommendations for fire-resistant construction not yet codified in all High FHSZ zones.
Sunset Boulevard is the only primary evacuation route for 10,000+ residents. No secondary route constructed. Palisades Fire 2025: 6,837 structures lost.
500-mile strategic fuel break network partially implemented. Eaton Fire burned through untreated WUI interface where breaks were incomplete.
$15K grant program for 20,000 WUI homes. Adoption at 22% due to low awareness and contractor capacity constraints.
